product.name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
product.description: Over-ear headphones with noise cancellation and 20-hour battery life.

product.name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
product.description: Insulated 750ml bottle that keeps drinks cold for 24 hours.

product.name: Men's Running Sneakers
product.description: Lightweight breathable sneakers designed for daily training.

product.name: Organic Arabica Coffee Beans 500g
product.description: Single-origin Kenyan Arabica beans, medium roast.

product.name: USB-C Fast Charger 30W
product.description: Compact fast charger compatible with most modern phones and tablets.

product.name: Cotton Bedsheet Set (Queen)
product.description: 100% cotton bedsheet set with two pillowcases, machine washable.
